issues.title: AzureOpenAiChatModel choices is null
issues.body:
java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "java.util.List.stream()" because the return value of "com.azure.ai.openai.models.ChatCompletions.getChoices()" is null
	at org.springframework.ai.azure.openai.AzureOpenAiChatModel.call(AzureOpenAiChatModel.java:147) ~[spring-ai-azure-openai-1.0.0-20240604.132753-256.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT]
